card_name_verified: The Blue Business® Plus Credit Card from American Express

recurring_credits.name: Software Subscription Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 annual statement credit for recurring software subscription expenses (e.g., FreshBooks, QuickBooks).
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: annual $100 statement credit for recurring software subscription expenses such as FreshBooks or QuickBooks

_review_reason: VERIFY: Original Blue Business Plus historically had NO recurring credits — was a no-frills 2x MR card. The $100 software credit may be a new 2026 enhancement OR may be confused with another product. Cross-check on americanexpress.com Blue Business Plus benefit page directly before promoting.
